text: Installed HACS v2.0.5 on Home Assistant. Restart triggered to activate. You can now add custom integrations like Mushroom cards, Bubble card, card-mod, and Adaptive Lighting from the HACS store in Settings > Devices & Services > HACS.

Session 7 complete: Built Wine Cellar, Finance, and Reminders pages. Landing page redesigned with Art Nouveau aesthetic. Cloudflare Access now requires OTP every visit. Radio automations confirmed targeting stairs speaker. Butler skill created. Dashboard redesigned as welcome page with weather.
Cloudflare Access is now open to all emails (OTP still required). Ask your wife to try logging in again — she should get through and see the access request form.

Night Protocol scene issue: Scene activates fine via API but some lights are unavailable (light.bathroom, light.office_lamp dead OSRAM). Need to edit the scene in HA to remove dead entities. Also check if the error was on the HA dashboard UI or the portal.

Session 8: Scraped 93 MWC wines (96 bottles) into data/wines.json. Built 3-tier security (CF Access + approved users + TOTP). Device fingerprinting and audit logging added. Deep technical descriptions on Voice, Devices, Security, Architecture pages. QR code for TOTP setup. CF Access session extended to 30 days.
